title: Enhanced Wilderness
description: Breathe new life into your Minecraft world with Enhanced Wilderness! This datapack enriches exploration by adding log piles, diverse tree variations, and more.
body:
# Enhanced Wilderness

Breathe new life into your Minecraft world with Enhanced Wilderness! This datapack enriches exploration by adding log piles, diverse tree variations, and more.

If you love exploring landscapes and want a more natural world without overhauling the game, this datapack is for you!

### Features:

- Logs pile (oak, spruce, birch)

- Tree variations

- Stone piles




This datapack tends to stay close to a vanilla experience

This datapack is currently in a beta phase

For any [issues please tell me here](https://github.com/Mrostone/Enhanced-Wilderness/issues) I will try to correct it as soon as possible.

[Here is a link](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/luna-s-custom-oak-trees/#tab_image_gallery) to _Luna's Custom Oak Trees_ where I take the tree models only for alpha and beta 1 and 2
